prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(register_realignment_case source_portfolio_1)
(register_realignment_case target_portfolio_1)
(register_realignment_case rebalancing_plan_a)
(register_realignment_case rebalancing_plan_b)
(assign_execution_desk_to_case source_portfolio_1 execution_desk_1)
(assign_execution_desk_to_case target_portfolio_1 execution_desk_2)
(assign_execution_desk_to_case rebalancing_plan_a execution_desk_3)
(attach_analytics_signal_to_case source_portfolio_1 analytics_signal_1)
(mark_case_approval_required source_portfolio_1 analytics_signal_1)
(assign_candidate_to_sell_leg source_portfolio_1 sell_leg_1 instrument_candidate_1)
(finalize_sell_leg_candidate source_portfolio_1 sell_leg_1 analytics_signal_1 instrument_candidate_1)
(release_analytics_signal_from_case source_portfolio_1 analytics_signal_1)
(attach_analytics_signal_to_case target_portfolio_1 analytics_signal_1)
(mark_case_approval_required target_portfolio_1 analytics_signal_1)
(assign_candidate_to_buy_leg target_portfolio_1 buy_leg_1 instrument_candidate_1)
(finalize_buy_leg_candidate target_portfolio_1 buy_leg_1 analytics_signal_1 instrument_candidate_1)
(release_analytics_signal_from_case target_portfolio_1 analytics_signal_1)
(assemble_order_ticket source_portfolio_1 target_portfolio_1 sell_leg_1 buy_leg_1 order_ticket_1)
(attach_analytics_signal_to_case source_portfolio_1 analytics_signal_1)
(mark_order_ticket_settlement_ready order_ticket_1 source_portfolio_1 analytics_signal_1)
(release_analytics_signal_from_case source_portfolio_1 analytics_signal_1)
(attach_analytics_signal_to_case rebalancing_plan_a analytics_signal_1)
(mark_case_approval_required rebalancing_plan_a analytics_signal_1)
(assign_settlement_account_to_plan rebalancing_plan_a settlement_account_1 order_ticket_1)
(validate_settlement_and_prepare_plan rebalancing_plan_a settlement_account_1 order_ticket_1 analytics_signal_1)
(assign_broker_to_plan rebalancing_plan_a broker_lp_1)
(assign_approval_unit_to_case rebalancing_plan_a approval_unit_1)
(attach_execution_parameter_to_plan rebalancing_plan_a execution_parameter_vwap)
(apply_execution_parameter_and_mark_for_broker_assignment rebalancing_plan_a execution_parameter_vwap approval_unit_1 settlement_account_1 order_ticket_1)
(attach_counterparty_constraint_to_plan rebalancing_plan_a counterparty_constraint_1)
(evaluate_counterparty_and_mark_pre_trade_ready rebalancing_plan_a counterparty_constraint_1 settlement_account_1 order_ticket_1)
(finalize_pre_trade_without_allocation_template rebalancing_plan_a)
(create_post_trade_assignment_for_case rebalancing_plan_a post_trade_assignment_record_1 analytics_signal_1)
(finalize_post_trade_assignment_for_plan rebalancing_plan_a execution_desk_3 post_trade_assignment_record_1)
(release_analytics_signal_from_case rebalancing_plan_a analytics_signal_1)
(release_approval_unit_from_case rebalancing_plan_a approval_unit_1)
(detach_execution_parameter_from_plan rebalancing_plan_a execution_parameter_vwap)
(detach_counterparty_constraint_from_plan rebalancing_plan_a counterparty_constraint_1)
(assign_execution_desk_to_case rebalancing_plan_b execution_desk_3)
(attach_analytics_signal_to_case rebalancing_plan_b analytics_signal_1)
(mark_case_approval_required rebalancing_plan_b analytics_signal_1)
(assign_settlement_account_to_plan rebalancing_plan_b settlement_account_2 order_ticket_1)
(validate_settlement_and_prepare_plan rebalancing_plan_b settlement_account_2 order_ticket_1 analytics_signal_1)
(assign_broker_to_plan rebalancing_plan_b broker_lp_2)
(assign_approval_unit_to_case rebalancing_plan_b approval_unit_1)
(attach_execution_parameter_to_plan rebalancing_plan_b execution_parameter_vwap)
(apply_execution_parameter_and_mark_for_broker_assignment rebalancing_plan_b execution_parameter_vwap approval_unit_1 settlement_account_2 order_ticket_1)
(attach_counterparty_constraint_to_plan rebalancing_plan_b counterparty_constraint_1)
(evaluate_counterparty_and_mark_pre_trade_ready rebalancing_plan_b counterparty_constraint_1 settlement_account_2 order_ticket_1)
(finalize_pre_trade_without_allocation_template rebalancing_plan_b)
(release_analytics_signal_from_case rebalancing_plan_b analytics_signal_1)
(create_post_trade_assignment_for_case rebalancing_plan_b post_trade_assignment_record_1 analytics_signal_1)
(finalize_post_trade_assignment_for_plan rebalancing_plan_b execution_desk_3 post_trade_assignment_record_1)
(trigger_execution_for_source_portfolio source_portfolio_1 order_ticket_1)
(trigger_execution_for_target_portfolio target_portfolio_1 order_ticket_1)
(attach_analytics_signal_to_case source_portfolio_1 analytics_signal_1)
(create_post_trade_assignment_for_case source_portfolio_1 post_trade_assignment_record_1 analytics_signal_1)
(finalize_post_trade_assignment_for_source_portfolio source_portfolio_1 execution_desk_1 post_trade_assignment_record_1)
(release_analytics_signal_from_case source_portfolio_1 analytics_signal_1)
(attach_analytics_signal_to_case target_portfolio_1 analytics_signal_1)
(create_post_trade_assignment_for_case target_portfolio_1 post_trade_assignment_record_1 analytics_signal_1)
(finalize_post_trade_assignment_for_target_portfolio target_portfolio_1 execution_desk_2 post_trade_assignment_record_1)
```

message.reasoning:
The problem is a classical planning problem in PDDL for "duration_target_realignment". I need to output only the executable plan as a sequence of ground PDDL actions, one per line, like (action-name arg1 arg2).


## Planning for PDDL Execution
- The task is to solve a classical planning problem in PDDL, specifically "duration_target_realignment."
- The output must be an executable plan, consisting of ground PDDL actions, with one action per line in the format (action-name arg1 arg2).

## Planning for PDDL Execution
- Entities include portfolio_role_group and portfolio_segment_group, both linked to realignment_case, with source_portfolio and target_portfolio as portfolio_role_group and rebalancing_plan as portfolio_segment_group.
- Actions like register_realignment_case (?realignment_case) are needed, as they support both types and initially set up the entities without requires_approval.

## Managing Resource Constraints
- Limited resources include one analytics_signal_1, one approval_unit_1, and others like instrument_candidate_1, with multiple execution_desks but only compliance_rule_1 available.
- Compliance_rule_2 is linked to rebalancing_plan_b, but its availability isn’t stated, suggesting it’s likely not accessible initially.

## Executing Approval Workflow
- The process starts with register_realignment_case, then assign_execution_desk_to_case, followed by attach_analytics_signal_to_case and mark_case_approval_required for requires_approval.
- Portfolios need requires_approval to use actions like assign_candidate_to_sell_leg, with sell_leg_1 for source and buy_leg_1 for target needing preparation.

## Handling Shared Resources
- Order_ticket_1 is shared between plans, while settlement_accounts differ, requiring careful sequencing of actions.
- Plans also involve linking to broker, allocation_template, and compliance, adding complexity to the execution sequence.

## Handling Shared Resources  
- Only one instrument_candidate_1 is available, requiring careful sequencing for source and target portfolios.  
- Finalize_sell_leg_candidate releases the candidate, allowing reuse for the other portfolio after initial assignment.  

## Sequencing Portfolio Actions  
- Assign candidate to source first, then finalize to release, enabling target to use it later.  
- Use assemble with buy_candidate_assigned if target isn’t ready, ensuring flexibility in order ticket assembly.  

## Managing Signal and Approval Links  
- Analytics_signal_1 is shared, needing sequential linking for actions like finalize_sell_leg_candidate.  
- Approval_unit_1 is limited, but leg preparation can avoid it, focusing on requires_approval flag instead.

## Verifying Portfolio States  
- Assign_candidate_to_sell_leg sets source_prepared, and finalize_sell_leg_candidate keeps it, ensuring the portfolio remains prepared for assembly.  
- Finalize_sell_leg_candidate sets source_ready and makes the instrument available, but doesn’t affect the prepared state.  

## Managing Signal Attachments  
- After finalizing, analytics_signal_1 is released from source_portfolio_1, requiring reattachment for mark_order_ticket_settlement_ready.  
- Reattach analytics_signal_1 using attach_analytics_signal_to_case, as it’s available and meets preconditions like initialized and desk assigned.  

## Preparing for Plan Execution  
- Mark_order_ticket_settlement_ready sets order_ticket_1 to settlement_ready, needing linked analytics_signal_1, assembled, and prepared states.  
- Both source and target portfolios are ready, with ticket assembled and settlement_ready, but plan_b lacks an available desk for assignment.

## Releasing Plan Resources
- Release analytics_signal_1, approval_unit_1, and execution parameters from plan_a to free resources for plan_b.
- Detach counterparty_constraint_1 from plan_a, ensuring all shared resources are available for reassignment.

## Preparing Plan B Execution
- Assign execution_desk_3 to plan_b, enabling further processing after desk availability.
- Attach analytics_signal_1 to plan_b, mark for approval, and assign settlement_account_2, ensuring readiness for settlement.

## Finalizing Plan B Workflow
- Validate settlement and prepare plan_b, then assign broker_lp_2, approval_unit_1, and execution parameters for execution.
- Finalize pre-trade and post-trade for plan_b, linking post_trade_assignment_record_1 and confirming execution, completing the process.

## Registering Initial Cases  
- Registered realignment cases for source_portfolio_1, target_portfolio_1, rebalancing_plan_a, and rebalancing_plan_b to initialize workflows.  
- Assigned execution desks to cases: execution_desk_1 for source_portfolio_1, execution_desk_2 for target_portfolio_1, and execution_desk_3 for rebalancing_plan_a.  

## Preparing Source Portfolio  
- Attached analytics_signal_1 to source_portfolio_1, marked for approval, and assigned candidate to sell_leg_1 with instrument_candidate_1.  
- Finalized sell_leg_candidate, then released analytics_signal_1, ensuring source portfolio readiness for further steps.  

## Preparing Target Portfolio  
- Attached analytics_signal_1 to target_portfolio_1, marked for approval, and assigned candidate to buy_leg_1 with instrument_candidate_1.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
